Hair is hairing 🫶🏻🫶🏻🫶🏻.               Nestled in the heart of COEX Mall—one of Asia’s largest underground shopping malls—this stunning open library is completely free to visit and is home to towering bookshelves, thousands of books and magazines, cozy reading spaces, and seasonal exhibitions. Whether you’re a book lover or just looking for one of Seoul’s most beautiful photo spots, this place is a must. 📍Getting here is easy—take Subway Line 2 to Samseong Station or Line 9 to Bongeunsa Station, then follow the signs into COEX Mall. After exploring the library, you can spend hours shopping, café hopping, trying amazing food, or visiting the nearby aquarium and other attractions. One stop, endless things to discover. If you’re already visiting the nearby Gangnam Style statue, Bongeunsa Temple, or exploring Gangnam, adding Starfield Library to your itinerary is an easy choice since they’re all within walking distance. 🤍🇰🇷   #Gangnam #longbraids #Seoul #hairgoals #longhair
